name: Kerberoasting - Service Ticket Request With RC4 Encryption
description: Detects Kerberoasting by identifying TGS requests (4769) using RC4 encryption for service accounts. Covers Rubeus kerberoast, Impacket GetUserSPNs, Invoke-Kerberoast, and manual setspn/klist approaches.
query: event.code: "4769" and winlog.event_data.TicketEncryptionType: "0x17" and winlog.event_data.Status: "0x0" and not winlog.event_data.TargetUserName: *$ and not winlog.event_data.ServiceName: (krbtgt or kadmin* or changepw*)
